vocab.meaning_vi: trở ngại, thất bại tạm thời
vocab.example: I faced a setback early in the project.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi gặp phải trở ngại ngay từ đầu dự án.

vocab.example: I once missed a deadline on an important project.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi từng trễ deadline của một dự án quan trọng.

vocab.example: I took responsibility for the delay right away.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi nhận trách nhiệm về sự chậm trễ ngay lập tức.

vocab.example: We found that the root cause was poor time estimation.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi phát hiện nguyên nhân gốc rễ là ước lượng thời gian kém.

vocab.meaning_vi: hồi phục, đứng dậy sau thất bại
vocab.example: It took time, but I managed to bounce back.
vocab.example_vi: Phải mất thời gian, nhưng tôi đã hồi phục được.

vocab.example: My biggest takeaway was to communicate earlier.
vocab.example_vi: Bài học lớn nhất của tôi là giao tiếp sớm hơn.

vocab.example: I like to reflect on what went wrong.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi thích nhìn lại những gì đã sai.

vocab.meaning_vi: phê bình mang tính xây dựng
vocab.example: I welcomed the constructive criticism from my manager.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đón nhận lời phê bình mang tính xây dựng từ quản lý của mình.

lines.speaker: Thao (interviewer)
lines.text: Can you tell me about a time you faced a setback at work?

lines.speaker: Khoa (candidate)
lines.text: Yes, I once missed a deadline on an important project.

lines.speaker: Khoa (candidate)
lines.text: I took responsibility for the delay right away and informed my manager.

lines.speaker: Thao (interviewer)
lines.text: Did you look into why it happened?

lines.speaker: Khoa (candidate)
lines.text: Yes, we found that the root cause was poor time estimation.

lines.speaker: Thao (interviewer)
lines.text: How did you bounce back from that experience?

lines.speaker: Khoa (candidate)
lines.text: I created a more realistic schedule for future projects.

lines.speaker: Thao (interviewer)
lines.text: What was your biggest takeaway from that experience?

lines.speaker: Khoa (candidate)
lines.text: My biggest takeaway was to communicate problems earlier.

lines.speaker: Thao (interviewer)
lines.text: That's a great example of learning from a mistake.

lines.speaker: Khoa (candidate)
lines.text: Thank you. I also try to reflect on feedback, even constructive criticism.

questions.q: What did Khoa face at work?
What was the root cause of the problem?

shadowing: I once missed a deadline on an important project at work.
I took responsibility for the delay and informed my manager immediately.
We found that the root cause was poor time estimation.
It took time, but I managed to bounce back quickly.
My biggest takeaway was to communicate problems much earlier next time.
